title: Happy Ghast+
description: HappyGhast+ is a datapack/mod that lets you customize the Happy Ghast, like flying speed and resistance.
body:
# **Happy Ghast+**
### [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1403752313289576541?label=Discord&logo=Discord)](https://discord.com/invite/pPZFaeYxu8)                            [![Bug Reports](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Eli55555/HappyGhast-DP?label=Bug%20Reports&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Eli55555/HappyGhast-DP/issues)
HappyGhast+ is a datapack/mod that lets you customize the Happy Ghast, like flying speed and resistance.
# **Features**
<details>
<summary>Settings Menu</summary>
You can open the Settings menu with the command "/function happy:settings".
  
![Settings Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2ee50351386dcd5ff5887f3867098d0f2007757_0.webp)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Flying Speed</summary>
Adjust the Happy Ghast's flying speed from Standard up to +200%.
Each setting can also be set to Enchantment mode, where the speed is determined by the Propeller enchantment on the harness instead.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Resistance</summary>
Set the Happy Ghast's resistance from Disabled up to Invincible.
Can also be set to Enchantment mode, where the resistance is determined by the Resistance enchantment on the harness instead.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Happy Ghast Anchor</summary>
Prevents the Happy Ghast from moving when no player is riding it. Can be set to Enchantment mode, where the Anchor enchantment on the harness controls this behavior.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchantment Loot</summary>
Controls whether Enchantment books can be found in chests. Useful for server owners who want to control the distribution of enchantments themselves, for example through custom shops or events.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>
Three new harness enchantments:

-   **Propeller** (I-III) – Increases the Happy Ghast's flying speed. Found in Nether Fortress chests when Flying Speed is set to Enchantment and Enchantment Loot is Enabled.
-   **Resistance** (I-III) – Gives the Happy Ghast resistance. Found in Bastion Treasure chests when Resistance is set to Enchantment and Enchantment Loot is Enabled.
-   **Anchor** (I) – Prevents the Happy Ghast from moving when unridden. Found in Pillager Outpost chests when Happy Ghast Anchor is set to Enchantment and Enchantment Loot is Enabled.
</details>
